name: Sambar Powder i (Sambar Podi I)
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons Bengal gram dal, picked over and rinsed (yellow split peas, channa dal)
2 teaspoons red gram dal (pigeon peas, toor dal), picked over and rinsed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 1 tablespoon oil in a heavy frying pan or skillet.
2. Add the chillies and saute for 1 - 3 minutes.
3. In a heavy saucepan, dry-roast all the other ingredients until they each give off a strong aroma. Do not roast the ground turmeric.
4. Place all the ingredients in an electric blender or food processor.
5. Blend into a fine powder.
6. Store in an airtight container and use as required.
7. Makes 7 ounces.
8. From Dakshin, Vegetarian Cuisine from South India by Chandra Padmanabhan.
